strategies.name: Fast B main
strategies.description: Quick B hit from main with cave support flash.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: rush B main smoke CT + cave flash

meta.purpose: Beat B defenders before rotations stabilize

strategies.name: B main mid split
strategies.description: Pressure B from main and mid together.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: B main + mid split smoke CT

meta.purpose: Split B and deny comfortable CT trading

strategies.name: Mid to A
strategies.description: Take mid and convert it into A pressure.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: mid control smoke donut go A

meta.purpose: Open A through donut and reduce direct main dependence
notes: A main can still support later

strategies.name: Fake A to B
strategies.description: Show A presence and rotate to B.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: [fake] A main smoke temple go B

meta.purpose: Pull temple and donut attention before real B finish
notes: do not commit too hard on A

strategies.name: A site hit
strategies.description: Simple A commitment with temple/CT denial.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: A site smoke temple + CT flash

meta.purpose: Isolate A defenders and limit rotate lines
notes: donut and lane must still be checked

strategies.name: Donut temple A
strategies.description: Split A through donut and main/temple pressure.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: donut + temple go A smoke CT

meta.purpose: Break A setup from layered routes

strategies.name: B main burst
strategies.description: Simple flash burst from B main.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Punish passive or utility-light B anchors

strategies.name: Mid cave pressure
strategies.description: Use mid pressure to support cave and B options.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: mid to cave pressure smoke mid

meta.purpose: Pin B defenders and open split timing
goodWhen: enemy cave control is contested poorly
notes: can convert to B or reset

strategies.name: Delayed A
strategies.description: Hide mid and hit A after one minute.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: hide mid till 1:00 then go A smoke CT + temple

meta.purpose: Punish early CT mid re-clear and late A complacency

strategies.name: A main late support
strategies.description: Use A main late while mid opens the site.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: take mid 3 then 2 A main go A smoke temple + CT

meta.purpose: Make A harder to read and split defenders late
goodWhen: mid is easier than direct A main

strategies.name: Cave to B split
strategies.description: Add cave timing to a B main finish.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: 2 cave 3 B main smoke CT go B

meta.purpose: Trade out site anchor from two directions

strategies.name: Silent A main
strategies.description: Walk A main and burst with minimal warning.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: [silent] A main walk then swing site smoke temple

meta.purpose: Catch A defenders before a full rotate call

strategies.name: Triple B start
strategies.description: Open with heavier B control.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Deny early B main and cave pressure
goodWhen: your team has strong B spawns
notes: rotate out after early info if needed

strategies.name: Cave push
strategies.description: Fight for cave aggressively.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Remove a key split route and gather B info

strategies.name: A hold
strategies.description: Stable A defense.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Keep A solid while mid and B manage information
notes: temple and donut roles should be clear

strategies.name: Mid control
strategies.description: Contest and stabilize around mid.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Stop easy donut routes and read T direction
notes: do not overextend into T-held lines

strategies.name: B stack
strategies.description: Gamble extra defenders on B.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Punish repeated B ends hard

strategies.name: Temple donut hold
strategies.description: Layer A defense around temple and donut.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Trade better versus A splits from mid

strategies.name: A retake
strategies.description: Delay A and retake later.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Avoid bad fights into layered A utility
goodWhen: A anchor gets isolated too often

strategies.name: Double cave
strategies.description: Use two players to stabilize cave.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Deny cave as a reliable T split route

strategies.name: Save crossfire
strategies.description: Compact economy-conscious hold.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Protect rifles and force Ts to clear multiple layers

strategies.name: B anti-rush
strategies.description: Prepare to stop fast B main rounds.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Delay a direct B flood before rotates arrive

strategies.name: Donut info
strategies.description: Play for donut information without full push.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: See if T mid converts toward A without risking too much

strategies.name: Lane support A
strategies.description: Support A from lane against direct site pressure.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Trade better against A main and lane bursts
